Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_MONAD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's one of those doors, but... Huh... This one isn't shining like the others.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It feels different, too...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_DISCOVERD_MONAD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Is this the "structure" Elizabeth referred[n]to as "not dissimilar" to the other door...?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I should probably check this door...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_MONAD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5003 0 0}Shall we take a look at it, Leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_MONAD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}All right. I'll keep watch for anything on my end.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5137 0 0}Oh, are we not going to take a closer look at that door?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_STOP
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I just got lost for a second...

Dialog.name: MSG_STOP_10
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Oh, I see. Well, do you want to check it now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_STAIRS
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5110 0 0}That's a long flight of stairs down...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It leads deeper into the depths of Tartarus compared to the other doors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It's almost like it's luring us to go all the way in... It's a little disturbing...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5062 0 0}Yet another door, even inside the first door... It feels like a very long pathway.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}It's a layout I've never seen before. Please be careful as you go on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_MONAD_DOOR
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Since the layout of this floor doesn't change, this door likely won't disappear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}So we can explore it anytime. We'll leave it up to you, Leader.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_YUKARI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 0 0 0}Huh... It doesn't look very strong...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_JUNPEI_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 0 0 0}Looks weak to me! Let's take it down quickly.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_SANADA_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}It doesn't seem like a very strong opponent to me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 0 0 0}All we have to do is beat this guy to move on?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_REACTION_MITSURU_00
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 0 0 0}It looks like we'll have to defeat it to continue on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_DISCOVERD_ENEMY_FUKA
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}It seems rather weak for a Shadow inside one of these doors...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}I have a bad feeling about this... Please be fully prepared if you plan to battle it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_TUTORIAL
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Strong Shadows exist behind this door as well. Defeating them will earn you rewards. If enemies are too strong, you can always try again later.[n]{f 1 1}
